span.p:
study_config_modular (the registry)
per study: feature_nb - matching_nb - model_nb

span.p:
Each dispatcher runs the config-named LEAF notebook as its own child run (full visibility).
Leaves are SEPARATE files owned by separate teams - no shared mega-notebook to merge.
Add a model = new leaf + one config row. LME just points at feature_lme + model_lme.
Same flat DAG at 4 studies or 400; for_each fans out and parallelizes.

svg.text: MODULAR — Registry dispatch (separate team-owned notebooks) + for_each
